_comment: Copilot agent configuration defaults. Copy to .copilot-agent.json at the repo root and edit to taste.

permissions._comment_defaultMode: Options: dontAsk | ask | denyAll. dontAsk allows workspace-write without prompts; use ask for higher-blast-radius repos.

_comment_model: Override with any model alias or full model name supported by your Copilot plan.

hooks._comment: Hooks run shell scripts at agent lifecycle points. Paths are relative to the repo root. See config/hooks.md for details.

mcp._comment: Add MCP server definitions here. Each key is a logical server name.
